column5: HOW TO CHOOSE WHICH WORKSHOP TO ATTEND:
Today, to honour the polarities of masculine and feminine, we choose to divide the workshops into two different categories.
We know that, for some of us, this can be a day where it's challenging to know which workshops to attend. We also know that others find this day the MOST valueable in the whole event.

column5: The division of sexes have nothing to do with gender identity or sexual preferences. Tantra is about letting go of identity and to just BE.
We want to unite rather than separate, we want to meet you beyond identification and to experience masculine energy and feminine energy in male and female bodies.
If you are legally male - please attend the workshops that are labelled as MALE.
If you are legally female - please attend the workshops that are labelled as FEMALE.
